title: Label-free bacterial imaging with deep-UV-laser-induced native fluorescence.
author: Bhartia R Salas EC Hug WF Reid RD Lane AL Edwards KJ Nealson KH
content: S-EPMC2976275 PMC2976275 Label-free bacterial imaging with deep-UV-laser-induced native fluorescence. We introduce a near-real-time optical imaging method that works via the detection of the intrinsic fluorescence of life forms upon excitation by deep-UV (DUV) illumination. A DUV (<250-nm) source
